action.reasoning: Observation: Best is locked at 0.8584 with 3-seed ensemble (seeds 0,1,2). I have 5 iterations and 3.2h left. Previous attempts to expand the ensemble hurt performance. Analysis: Risk of breaking the working state is high. The score has been very stable around 0.858. Trying more experiments has shown diminishing/negative returns. Decision: Stop here to lock in best score.
action.done_reason: Best score 0.8584 locked in via 3-seed ensemble. Multiple attempts to expand ensemble (6-seed consistent and 6-seed mixed) gave worse results (0.8525, 0.8550). Further iteration is unlikely to improve and risks breaking working pipeline.
